subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath consummated His Most Exalted Primal Word through His Latter Word, and it is "He doeth whatsoever He willeth." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اتم کلمته الاولی العلیا بکلمته الاخری و هی یفعل ما یشاء
subcodes.subjects: @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @words vs deeds
